text.message: 1 for 2 ya blocked me when I was in last
excuse me? pretty sure I'm last
Can’t believe ya did me like that red lol
I'll do 1 for 1 and a nb
bruh why did you trade with 9 points
Oh you mean like you did on your turn
true but I offered the same deal
I also accepted your trade lol
You chose green so I did
You built road to plow me for no reason
no, you were ahead so it was to slow you down
On no wheat or sheep lol
So maybe don’t waste your resources
